page_title: Groundwork of EVANGELION: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo 02
text:
is a full color artbook published by Groundworks Co., ltd. on 22 August 2014. It features the original drawings of the film Evangelion: 3.0 You Can (Not) Redo. https://www.evastore.jp/shop/g/gZ0000108/
